description: A nested sub-prefab entry inside a PrefabDef. The containing element name is the PrefabDef defName (the 'def' field). Supports an optional single text node mapping to 'position' (XmlHelper.ParseElements default-value behavior).

def.label: Prefab
def.description: PrefabDef defName. Populated from the XML element name by the keyedObjectList loader.

chance.label: Chance
chance.description: Probability this sub-prefab is placed (0-1). Defaults to 1.

position.label: Position
position.description: Placement offset from this prefab's origin, as '(x, y, z)'. May also be provided as a single text node on the element when using the ParseElements default-value shorthand.

positions.label: Positions
positions.description: List of specific spawn offsets. Each <li> is an IntVec3 as '(x, y, z)'.

relativeRotation.label: Relative rotation
relativeRotation.description: Rotation offset for the sub-prefab relative to this prefab's rotation.
